title VI of the Housing and Community Development Act of 1987;

section 8(e)(2) of the United States Housing Act of 1937 [], except for funds allocated under such section for single room occupancy dwellings as authorized by title IV of the McKinney-Vento Homeless Assistance Act [ et seq.]; and42 U.S.C. 1437f(e)(2)42 U.S.C. 11360
section 810 of the Housing and Community Development Act of 1974 [].12 U.S.C. 1706e

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), effective on , the provisions of law referred to in subsection (a) are repealed.October 1, 1991

children.heading: No effect on SRO program
children.label: 2 No effect on SRO program
children.text: The provision of law referred to in subsection (a)(4) shall remain in effect with respect to single room occupancy dwellings as authorized by title IV of the McKinney-Vento Homeless Assistance Act [ et seq.].42 U.S.C. 11360

children.heading: Disposition of repayments
children.label: c Disposition of repayments
children.text: Any amounts received on or after , as repayments or recaptures in connection with the programs referred to in subsection (a) and any other amounts for such programs that remain or become unobligated on or after such date, shall be paid into the general fund of the Treasury.October 1, 1991
